name: PROJECT MAZE
short_description: Welcome to Project Maze, a game where you must show your space orientation skills and get through the mazes.
detailed_description:
Before you buy


About the Game

Welcome to Project Maze, a game where you must complete three manually generated mazes of increasing difficulty. Each one is larger than the previous one, but if that's too easy for you, you have the option to create your own unique maze by setting the size and seed of the generation.
You can play in single player or network cooperative mode, where the mazes are procedurally generated each time, creating new challenges for you and your friends.
But that's not all - a huge fourth maze awaits you, featuring a competitive element in the form of a leaderboard. In this mode your goal is to complete the maze as quickly as possible, so you can get to the top of the leaderboard.
The goal of the game is to get through the mazes alone or together with your friends.

Show your space orientation skills and work as a team to reach a common goal!

Features:

  • 3 unique mazes
  • 1 maze with a competitive element
  • Ability to create and pass your own maze
  • Level editor
  • Multiplayer cooperative mode
  • Character customization
  • Leaderboard
  • Online statistics
  • Steam Workshop
